calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-05-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: Sonia Wong.
Matter continued from December 15, 2006, at 09:00 A.M. for the original proof of publication to be filed.
Petitioner: Jeffrey Abram Waterbury, sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Jehfree Spirit.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-15-2005 Reset To Jan-05-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Petitioner: Jeffrey Abram Waterbury, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
Matter continued January 5, 2006 for filing of original proof of publication.
